lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਮਨੀਆਰੁ ਨ ਚੂੜੀਆ ਨਾ ਸੇ ਵੰਗੁੜੀਆਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa maneeaar na choorreea naa se vangurreeaahaa |
lines.english: You don't have the bracelets of gold, nor the good crystal jewelry; you haven't dealt with the true jeweller.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਹ ਕੰਠਿ ਨ ਲਗੀਆ ਜਲਨੁ ਸਿ ਬਾਹੜੀਆਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo seh kantth na lageea jalan si baaharreeaahaa |
lines.english: Those arms, which do not embrace the neck of the Husband Lord, burn in anguish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮਾਲੀ ਹਉ ਖਰੀ ਸੁਚਜੀ ਤੈ ਸਹ ਏਕਿ ਨ ਭਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: amaalee hau kharee suchajee tai seh ek na bhaavaa |
lines.english: O friend, I may look very attractive, but I am not pleasing to my Husband Lord at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਸਹੀਆ ਸਹੁ ਰਾਵਣਿ ਗਈਆ ਹਉ ਦਾਧੀ ਕੈ ਦਰਿ ਜਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh saheea sahu raavan geea hau daadhee kai dar jaavaa |
lines.english: All my companions have gone to enjoy their Husband Lord; which door should I, the wretched one, go to?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਗਈ ਨ ਮੰਨੀਆ ਮਰਉ ਵਿਸੂਰਿ ਵਿਸੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: agai gee na maneea mrau visoor visoore |
lines.english: but when I go before Him, I am not accepted, and I die, suffering in anguish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਠਿ ਗੁੰਦਾਈਁ ਪਟੀਆ ਭਰੀਐ ਮਾਗ ਸੰਧੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: maatth gundaaee patteea bhareeai maag sandhoore |
lines.english: I have woven my hair into lovely braids, and saturated their partings with vermillion;

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਨ ਰੁਨਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਤਨ ਕਾ ਬਿਰਹਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਹਉ ਪਿਰਹੁ ਵਿਛੋੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik na runaa mere tan kaa birahaa jin hau pirahu vichhorree |
lines.english: The only thing which doesn't weep is my body's sense of separateness, which has separated me from my Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਰੋਵੰਦੀ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਰੁਨਾ ਰੁੰਨੜੇ ਵਣਹੁ ਪੰਖੇਰੂ ॥
lines.translit: mai rovandee sabh jag runaa runarre vanahu pankheroo |
lines.english: I weep; the whole world weeps; even the birds of the forest weep with me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਪਨੈ ਆਇਆ ਭੀ ਗਇਆ ਮੈ ਜਲੁ ਭਰਿਆ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: supanai aaeaa bhee geaa mai jal bhariaa roe |
lines.english: In a dream, He came, and went away again; I cried so many tears.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇ ਨ ਸਕਾ ਤੁਝ ਕਨਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਭੇਜਿ ਨ ਸਕਾ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aae na sakaa tujh kan piaare bhej na sakaa koe |
lines.english: I can't come to You, O my Beloved, and I can't send anyone to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਉ ਸਭਾਗੀ ਨੀਦੜੀਏ ਮਤੁ ਸਹੁ ਦੇਖਾ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aau sabhaagee needarree mat sahu dekhaa soe |
lines.english: Come to me, O blessed sleep - perhaps I will see my Husband Lord again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਕੀ ਬਾਤ ਜਿ ਆਖੈ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਆ ਦੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: tai saahib kee baat ji aakhai kahu naanak kiaa deejai |
lines.english: One who brings me a message from my Lord and Master - says Nanak, what shall I give to Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਨ ਮਰੀਜੈ ਜੀਅੜਾ ਨ ਦੀਜੈ ਜਾ ਸਹੁ ਭਇਆ ਵਿਡਾਣਾ ॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: kiau na mareejai jeearraa na deejai jaa sahu bheaa viddaanaa |1|3|
lines.english: Why haven't I died? Why hasn't my life just ended? My Husband Lord has become a stranger to me. ||1||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਸੁ ਵਢੇ ਕਰਿ ਬੈਸਣੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਿਰ ਸੇਵ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: sees vadte kar baisan deejai vin sir sev kareejai |
lines.english: Cutting off my head, I give it to Him to sit upon; without my head, I shall still serve Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਜਗਤੁ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eih jagat bharam bhulaaeaa viralaa boojhai koe |1|
lines.english: This world is deluded by doubt; how rare are those who understand this. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਮੈਲੈ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਮੈਲਾ ਤਨਿ ਧੋਤੈ ਮਨੁ ਹਛਾ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man mailai sabh kichh mailaa tan dhotai man hachhaa na hoe |
lines.english: When the mind is filthy, everything is filthy; by washing the body, the mind is not cleaned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਏਹੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satagur deea mo kau ehu nidhaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Guru has given me this treasure. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਤੂ ਏਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: jap man mere too eko naam |
lines.english: O my mind, chant the One Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧਾ ਕੇ ਆਸਣ ਜੇ ਸਿਖੈ ਇੰਦ੍ਰੀ ਵਸਿ ਕਰਿ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sidhaa ke aasan je sikhai indree vas kar kamaae |
lines.english: Even if one learns the Yogic postures of the Siddhas, and holds his sexual energy in check,

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਮਨ ਕਉ ਹੋਰੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਕੋ ਨਾਹੀ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eis man kau hor sanjam ko naahee vin satigur kee saranaae |
lines.english: This mind is not controlled by any other discipline, except the Sanctuary of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: man kee mail na utarai haumai mail na jaae |2|
lines.english: still, the filth of the mind is not removed, and the filth of egotism is not eliminated. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਉਲਟੀ ਭਈ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satagur miliai ulattee bhee kahanaa kichhoo na jaae |3|
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, one is transformed beyond description. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਣਤਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਮਿਲਦੋ ਮਰੈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੀਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhanat naanak satigur kau milado marai gur kai sabad fir jeevai koe |
lines.english: Prays Nanak, one who dies upon meeting the True Guru, shall be rejuvenated through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਮਤਾ ਕੀ ਮਲੁ ਉਤਰੈ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਹਛਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: mamataa kee mal utarai ihu man hachhaa hoe |4|1|
lines.english: The filth of his attachment and possessiveness shall depart, and his mind shall become pure. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰੀ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਨਦਰੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: nadaree satagur seveeai nadaree sevaa hoe |
lines.english: By His Grace, one serves the True Guru; by His Grace, service is performed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰੀ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਵਸਿ ਆਵੈ ਨਦਰੀ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: nadaree ihu man vas aavai nadaree man niramal hoe |1|
lines.english: By His grace, this mind is controlled, and by His Grace, it becomes pure. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਚੇਤਿ ਸਚਾ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man chet sachaa soe |
lines.english: O my mind, think of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਚੇਤਹਿ ਤਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਮੂਲੇ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eko cheteh taa sukh paaveh fir dookh na moole hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Think of the One Lord, and you shall obtain peace; you shall never suffer in sorrow again. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰੀ ਮਰਿ ਕੈ ਜੀਵੀਐ ਨਦਰੀ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: nadaree mar kai jeeveeai nadaree sabad vasai man aae |
lines.english: By His Grace, one dies while yet alive, and by His Grace, the Word of the Shabad is enshrined in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰੀ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: nadaree hukam bujheeai hukame rahai samaae |2|
lines.english: By His Grace, one understands the Hukam of the Lord's Command, and by His Command, one merges into the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨ ਰਸ ਸਾਦੇ ਲਗਿ ਰਹੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: an ras saade lag rahee dukh paaeaa doojai bhaae |3|
lines.english: It remains attached to other pleasures, and through the love of duality, it suffers in pain. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਨ ਚਖਿਓ ਸਾ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਜਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin jihavaa har ras na chakhio saa jihavaa jal jaau |
lines.english: That tongue, which does not savor the sublime essence of the Lord - may that tongue be burned off!

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਨਦਰਿ ਏਕ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਫਰਕੁ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa nadar ek hai aape farak karee |
lines.english: The One Lord grants His Grace to all; He Himself makes distinctions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਡਾਈ ਦੇਇ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak satagur miliai fal paaeaa naam vaddaaee dee |4|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, meeting the True Guru, the fruits are obtained, and one is blessed with the Glorious Greatness of the Naam. ||4||2||
